name: Pandora
short_description: Pandora brings a mix of the moba genre with soul mechanics, destroy towers and fight different enemies with an innovative playstyle, use mounts and pets to help you during your gameplay.
detailed_description:
In a magnificent open world that, part playground, part death trap, never fails to provide multiple and constant surprises to those who seek them. When Pandora, you will come across the character creator, where you will be able to choose the physical aspects and, most importantly, the class. Each of the eight classes or origins has different equipment and distribution in the initial nine stats, which ends up greatly affecting the first two dozen hours of the game. The initial area of the game, it will be possible to see castles, plains, sculptures, forests... And everything is affordable. Everything is exploitable from the very beginning.


The Pandora Experience:
> Destroy the towers and face the enemies.
> Play with different races and classes.
> Gradually develop the learning in witchcraft.
> Constant auto-saving that will make you depend on your decisions.
> Discover challenging scenarios.
> A unique experience at every stage.
